name: Preecha Chanapai
description: '''Preecha Chanapai ('''{{Langx|th|ปรีชา ชนะภัย}}; born April 18, 1955), more widely known by his [[stage name]] '''Lek Carabao''' ({{langx|th|เล็ก คาราบาว}}), is a Thai musician and singer. He is a member of [[Carabao (band)|Carabao]], a famous and popular [[Thai rock]] band, and a proponent of ''[[phleng phuea chiwit]],'' a Thai [[protest song]] genre.
